metadata.description: Local marketplace hosting the clawsewitz plugin

plugins.name: clawsewitz
plugins.description: Clawsewitz — a senior partner-grade strategy agent grounded in Clausewitz. Self-contained 7-step Strategy Loop with MECE rigor and one Clausewitzian lens per stage (Trinity, Schwerpunkt, moral forces, fog, boldness, Ends-Ways-Means, friction, reserves).
